title: Speed-to-value frame lands in 62% of discovery calls
anchor: Gong sampling shows the repositioning message getting picked up by prospects in 17 of 27 April calls.
connect: Platform-consolidation frame appears in just 5 calls over the same window.
body: Gong sampling shows the repositioning message getting picked up by prospects in 17 of 27 April calls. Platform-consolidation frame appears in just 5 calls over the same window.
trace: Strong adoption of the primary messaging frame in discovery conversations, with the secondary frame barely registering.

title: ICP-aligned wins close 12 days faster than non-ICP deals
anchor: The customer profile match is producing velocity gains on deals that fit the target.
connect: ICP match rate climbed to 78% in Q2 from 64% in Q1.
body: The customer profile match is producing velocity gains on deals that fit the target. ICP match rate climbed to 78% in Q2 from 64% in Q1.
trace: ICP definition refinement showing both quality improvements and cycle time benefits.

title: Beacon Systems win rate jumps to 64% from 28% baseline
anchor: Q2 head-to-head record shows 14-8 record across 22 direct competitive deals.
connect: Battlecard utilization climbed to 61% of Beacon opportunities this quarter.
body: Q2 head-to-head record shows 14-8 record across 22 direct competitive deals. Battlecard utilization climbed to 61% of Beacon opportunities this quarter.
trace: Dramatic competitive position improvement coinciding with higher battlecard adoption rates.

title: Northstar objection handling lifts win rate 9 points in three weeks
anchor: Post-April 8 battlecard update shows 51% win rate versus 42% in the prior period.
connect: Northstar mentions in Gong transcripts dropped 22% since the update went live.
body: Post-April 8 battlecard update shows 51% win rate versus 42% in the prior period. Northstar mentions in Gong transcripts dropped 22% since the update went live.
trace: Rapid impact from competitive response content, both in deal outcomes and conversation dynamics.

title: Verge IO reaches 24% of competitive deals following Series B
anchor: 18 of 75 Q2 competitive opportunities included Verge IO, concentrating in mid-market segment.
connect: Q1 Verge IO appearance rate sat at 11% across competitive deals.
body: 18 of 75 Q2 competitive opportunities included Verge IO, concentrating in mid-market segment. Q1 Verge IO appearance rate sat at 11% across competitive deals.
trace: Competitor emergence following funding event, with clear segment concentration pattern.

title: Asset-opening reps generate 2.4x the pipeline of non-adopters

connect: 71% of reps opened launch materials versus 42% adoption on the prior launch.
body: April 8 launch shows clear correlation between enablement engagement and deal creation in first 14 days. 71% of reps opened launch materials versus 42% adoption on the prior launch.
trace: Strong enablement uptake producing measurable pipeline multiplier effects.

title: April launch creates $420K pipeline in first three weeks

connect: October launch produced $310K in the same three-week timeframe.
body: Atlas CRM Sync generated 14 new opportunities across the initial post-launch window. October launch produced $310K in the same three-week timeframe.
trace: Launch pipeline generation showing improvement over prior product release performance.

title: Launch-attributable pipeline crosses 18% of Q2 net new volume

connect: April launch first-week pipeline ran at 2.0x the prior launch's opening pace.
body: $620K of the quarter's $3.4M total pipeline carries launch attribution tags. April launch first-week pipeline ran at 2.0x the prior launch's opening pace.

connect: Prior launch positioning brief cleared just 2 days before ship date.
body: Atlas Forecast Pro readiness items signed off May 5 with all three components complete. Prior launch positioning brief cleared just 2 days before ship date.

title: Earned media pickup rate reaches 42% on April announcement

connect: Prior launch pickup rate landed at 28% across similar outreach volume.
body: 22 of 53 outreached publications covered the Atlas CRM Sync launch story. Prior launch pickup rate landed at 28% across similar outreach volume.

title: Enterprise inbound gains $290K with new positioning hook

connect: Inbound-to-meeting conversion lifted 8 points across the same segment.
body: Q2 enterprise inbound pipeline reflects the repositioning frame taking hold in the market. Inbound-to-meeting conversion lifted 8 points across the same segment.

title: Mid-market enterprise close rates split 31% versus 13% on speed-to-value
anchor: Same positioning frame produces different outcomes across customer segments.

body: Same positioning frame produces different outcomes across customer segments. Mid-market ICP alignment sits at 78% while enterprise segment match varies.

title: Close reason capture reaches 92% completion in Q2

connect: Q1 capture rate sat at 71% across deal closing activity.
body: 47 of 51 closed deals include outcome data in CRM records this quarter. Q1 capture rate sat at 71% across deal closing activity.

title: Implementation timeline surfaces as exit interview positioning theme
anchor: 6 of 14 April customer interviews flagged expectations around deployment speed.
connect: Integration breadth also emerged as a positioning signal from the same interview set.
body: 6 of 14 April customer interviews flagged expectations around deployment speed. Integration breadth also emerged as a positioning signal from the same interview set.
trace: Customer feedback revealing positioning gaps that directly connect to competitive positioning work.

title: Beacon competitive deals carry exit interview themes 31% of the time
anchor: Implementation timeline and integration breadth appear in nearly one-third of head-to-head opportunities.
connect: Both themes emerged from April customer exit interviews as positioning signals.
body: Implementation timeline and integration breadth appear in nearly one-third of head-to-head opportunities. Both themes emerged from April customer exit interviews as positioning signals.
